query: You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository. The codebase is at version 2.175 (commit: 1f949804). ## Issue to Resolve Improve "discard changes" dialog options If you click Add note and type something and then close the window without saving the changes, the following message pops up. This pop up also appears at other places (for e.g. when leaving the Deck Options page without clicking Save). The issue with this pop up is that "OK" and "Cancel" don't seem to be the correct responses to a message that says "Close and lose current input". What about using the following instead? - Anki Desktop: - Google Photos: ## Additional Context from Issue Discussion Will use `TR` from backend Good first issue, I have fixed it if anyone wants to drop a PR here's the patch ``` Subject: [PATCH] string from backend --- Index: AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/EditDeckDescriptionDialog.kt IDEA additional info: Subsystem: com.intellij.openapi.diff.impl.patch.CharsetEP <+>UTF-8 =================================================================== diff --git a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/EditDeckDescriptionDialog.kt b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/EditDeckDescriptionDialog.kt --- a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/EditDeckDescriptionDialog.kt (revision 906dd02571179f3096af4cdf32a924385c2af4b2) +++ b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/EditDeckDescriptionDialog.kt (date 1708346927147) @@ -24,6 +24,7 @@ import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment import com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar import com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText +import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager.withCol import com.ichi2.anki.R import com.ichi2.anki.StudyOptionsFragment @@ -106,7 +107,7 @@ } Timber.i("asking if user should discard changes") - DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(requireContext()) { + DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(requireContext(),getString(R.string.discard), CollectionManager.TR.addingKeepEditing(), CollectionManager.TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()) { closeWithoutSaving() } } Index: AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.kt IDEA additional info: Subsystem: com.intellij.openapi.diff.impl.patch.CharsetEP <+>UTF-8 =================================================================== diff --git a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.kt b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.kt --- a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.kt (revision 906dd02571179f3096af4cdf32a924385c2af4b2) +++ b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.kt (date 1708345145742) @@ -98,7 +98,9 @@ } private fun showDiscardChangesDialog() { - DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(this, ::discardChangesAndClose) + DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(this,getString(R.string.discard), CollectionManager.TR.addingKeepEditing(), CollectionManager.TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()){ + discardChangesAndClose() + } } private fun showRestoreDefaultDialog() { Index: AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/DiscardChangesDialog.kt IDEA additional info: Subsystem: com.intellij.openapi.diff.impl.patch.CharsetEP <+>UTF-8 =================================================================== diff --git a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/DiscardChangesDialog.kt b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/DiscardChangesDialog.kt --- a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/DiscardChangesDialog.kt (revision 906dd02571179f3096af4cdf32a924385c2af4b2) +++ b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/DiscardChangesDialog.kt (date 1708344904076) @@ -23,15 +23,16 @@ import com.ichi2.utils.positiveButton import com.ichi2.utils.show -class DiscardChangesDialog { - companion object { +object DiscardChangesDialog { fun showDialog( context: Context, + positiveButtonText:String, + negativeButtonText:String, + message:String, positiveMethod: () -> Unit ) = AlertDialog.Builder(context).show { - message(R.string.discard_unsaved_changes) - positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) { positiveMethod() } - negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) + message(text = message) + positiveButton(text = positiveButtonText) { positiveMethod() } + negativeButton(text = negativeButtonText) } - } } Index: AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/02-strings.xml IDEA additional info: Subsystem: com.intellij.openapi.diff.impl.patch.CharsetEP <+>UTF-8 =================================================================== diff --git a/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/02-strings.xml b/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/02-strings.xml --- a/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/02-strings.xml (revision 906dd02571179f3096af4cdf32a924385c2af4b2) +++ b/AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/02-strings.xml (date 1708345145711) @@ -94,7 +94,7 @@ Edit note - Close and lose current input? + Discard No cards created. Please fill in more fields The first field is empty This note type must contain cloze deletions Index: AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/NoteEditor.kt IDEA additional info: Subsystem: com.intellij.openapi.diff.impl.patch.CharsetEP <+>UTF-8 =================================================================== diff --git a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/NoteEditor.kt b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/NoteEditor.kt --- a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/NoteEditor.kt (revision 906dd02571179f3096af4cdf32a924385c2af4b2) +++ b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/NoteEditor.kt (date 1708345145736) @@ -1260,7 +1260,7 @@ } private fun showDiscardChangesDialog() { - DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(this) { + DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(this,getString(R.string.discard), TR.addingKeepEditing(), TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()) { Timber.i("NoteEditor:: OK button pressed to confirm discard changes") closeNoteEditor() } Index: AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditor.kt IDEA additional info: Subsystem: com.intellij.openapi.diff.impl.patch.CharsetEP <+>UTF-8 =================================================================== diff --git a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditor.kt b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditor.kt --- a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditor.kt (revision 906dd02571179f3096af4cdf32a924385c2af4b2) +++ b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditor.kt (date 1708345145724) @@ -197,7 +197,7 @@ return tempModel != null && tempModel!!.notetype.toString() != oldModel.toString() } - private fun showDiscardChangesDialog() = DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(this) { + private fun showDiscardChangesDialog() = DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(this,getString(R.string.discard), CollectionManager.TR.addingKeepEditing(), CollectionManager.TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()) { Timber.i("TemplateEditor:: OK button pressed to confirm discard changes") // Clear the edited model from any cache files, and clear it from this objects memory to discard changes CardTemplateNotetype.clearTempModelFiles() Index: AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditorTest.kt IDEA additional info: Subsystem: com.intellij.openapi.diff.impl.patch.CharsetEP <+>UTF-8 =================================================================== diff --git a/AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditorTest.kt b/AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditorTest.kt --- a/AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditorTest.kt (revision 906dd02571179f3096af4cdf32a924385c2af4b2) +++ b/AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateEditorTest.kt (date 1708345337078) @@ -78,14 +78,14 @@ // Make sure we get a confirmation dialog if we hit the back button assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(android.R.id.home)) advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep() - assertEquals("Wrong dialog shown?", getAlertDialogText(true), getResourceString(R.string.discard_unsaved_changes)) + assertEquals("Wrong dialog shown?", getAlertDialogText(true), "Discard current input?") clickAlertDialogButton(DialogInterface.BUTTON_NEGATIVE, false) advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep() assertTrue("model change not preserved despite canceling back button?", testEditor.modelHasChanged()) // Make sure we things are cleared out after a cancel assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(android.R.id.home)) - assertEquals("Wrong dialog shown?", getAlertDialogText(true), getResourceString(R.string.discard_unsaved_changes)) + assertEquals("Wrong dialog shown?", getAlertDialogText(true), "Discard current input?") clickAlertDialogButton(DialogInterface.BUTTON_POSITIVE, false) advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep() assertFalse("model change not cleared despite discarding changes?", testEditor.modelHasChanged()) Index: AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/pages/DeckOptions.kt IDEA additional info: Subsystem: com.intellij.openapi.diff.impl.patch.CharsetEP <+>UTF-8 =================================================================== diff --git a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/pages/DeckOptions.kt b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/pages/DeckOptions.kt --- a/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/pages/DeckOptions.kt (revision 906dd02571179f3096af4cdf32a924385c2af4b2) +++ b/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/pages/DeckOptions.kt (date 1708345145717) @@ -55,7 +55,7 @@ private val onBackSaveCallback = object : OnBackPressedCallback(true) { override fun handleOnBackPressed() { Timber.v("DeckOptions: showing 'discard changes'") - DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(requireContext()) { + DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(requireContext(),getString(R.string.discard), CollectionManager.TR.addingKeepEditing(), CollectionManager.TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()) { Timber.i("OK button pressed to confirm discard changes") this.isEnabled = false requireActivity().onBackPressedDispatcher.onBackPressed() ``` working on it ## Relevant Files The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue: - `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.kt` - `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/dialogs/DiscardChangesDialog.kt` - `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/02-strings.xml` ## Instructions Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. content.thinking:
Let me analyze this issue. The problem is that the "discard changes" dialog currently shows "OK" and "Cancel" buttons, which don't make sense for a message like "Close and lose current input?". The fix should use strings from the backend (TR) to show more appropriate options like "Discard" and "Keep Editing".

Let me start by reading the relevant files to understand the current implementation.

418→            val end = max(editorEditText.selectionEnd, 0)

453→        private fun setupMenu() {
454→            // Enable menu
455→            (requireActivity() as MenuHost).addMenuProvider(
456→                object : MenuProvider {
457→                    override fun onCreateMenu(menu: Menu, menuInflater: MenuInflater) {
458→                        menu.clear()
459→                        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.card_template_editor, menu)
460→
461→                        if (templateEditor.tempModel!!.notetype.isCloze) {
462→                            Timber.d("Editing cloze model, disabling add/delete card template and deck override functionality")
463→                            menu.findItem(R.id.action_add).isVisible = false
464→                            menu.findItem(R.id.action_add_deck_override).isVisible = false
465→                        } else {
466→                            val template = getCurrentTemplate()
467→
468→                            @StringRes val overrideStringRes = if (template != null && template.has("did") && !template.isNull("did")) {
469→                                R.string.card_template_editor_deck_override_on
470→                            } else {
471→                                R.string.card_template_editor_deck_override_off
472→                            }
473→                            menu.findItem(R.id.action_add_deck_override).setTitle(overrideStringRes)
474→                        }
475→
476→                        // It is invalid to delete if there is only one card template, remove the option from UI
477→                        if (templateEditor.tempModel!!.templateCount < 2) {
478→                            menu.findItem(R.id.action_delete).isVisible = false
479→                        }
480→
481→                        // marked insert field menu item invisible for style view
482→                        val isInsertFieldItemVisible = currentEditorViewId != R.id.styling_edit
483→                        menu.findItem(R.id.action_insert_field).isVisible = isInsertFieldItemVisible
484→                    }
485→
486→                    override fun onMenuItemSelected(menuItem: MenuItem): Boolean {
487→                        val col = templateEditor.getColUnsafe
488→                        val tempModel = templateEditor.tempModel
489→                        when (menuItem.itemId) {
490→                            R.id.action_add -> {
491→                                Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Add template button pressed")
492→                                // Show confirmation dialog
493→                                val ordinal = templateEditor.viewPager.currentItem
494→                                // isOrdinalPendingAdd method will check if there are any new card types added or not,
495→                                // if TempModel has new card type then numAffectedCards will be 0 by default.
496→                                val numAffectedCards = if (!CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(tempModel!!, ordinal)) {
497→                                    col.notetypes.tmplUseCount(tempModel.notetype, ordinal)
498→                                } else {
499→                                    0
500→                                }
501→                                confirmAddCards(tempModel.notetype, numAffectedCards)
502→                                return true
503→                            }
504→                            R.id.action_insert_field -> showInsertFieldDialog()
505→                            R.id.action_delete -> {
506→                                Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Delete template button pressed")
507→                                val res = resources
508→                                val ordinal = templateEditor.viewPager.currentItem
509→                                val template = tempModel!!.getTemplate(ordinal)
510→                                // Don't do anything if only one template
511→                                if (tempModel.templateCount < 2) {
512→                                    templateEditor.showSimpleMessageDialog(res.getString(R.string.card_template_editor_cant_delete))
513→                                    return true
514→                                }
515→
516→                                if (deletionWouldOrphanNote(col, tempModel, ordinal)) {
517→                                    return true
518→                                }
519→
520→                                // Show confirmation dialog
521→                                val numAffectedCards = if (!CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(tempModel, ordinal)) {
522→                                    Timber.d("Ordinal is not a pending add, so we'll get the current card count for confirmation")
523→                                    col.notetypes.tmplUseCount(tempModel.notetype, ordinal)
524→                                } else {
525→                                    0
526→                                }
527→                                confirmDeleteCards(template, tempModel.notetype, numAffectedCards)
528→                                return true
529→                            }
530→                            R.id.action_add_deck_override -> {
531→                                displayDeckOverrideDialog(tempModel!!)
532→                                return true
533→                            }
534→                            R.id.action_preview -> {
535→                                performPreview()
536→                                return true
537→                            }
538→                            R.id.action_confirm -> {
539→                                Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Save model button pressed")
540→                                if (modelHasChanged()) {
541→                                    val confirmButton = templateEditor.findViewById<View>(R.id.action_confirm)
542→                                    if (confirmButton != null) {
543→                                        if (!confirmButton.isEnabled) {
544→                                            Timber.d("CardTemplateEditor::discarding extra click after button disabled")
545→                                            return true
546→                                        }
547→                                        confirmButton.isEnabled = false
548→                                    }
549→                                    launchCatchingTask(resources.getString(R.string.card_template_editor_save_error)) {
550→                                        requireActivity().withProgress(resources.getString(R.string.saving_model)) {
551→                                            withCol { tempModel!!.saveToDatabase() }
552→                                        }
553→                                        onModelSaved()
554→                                    }
555→                                } else {
556→                                    Timber.d("CardTemplateEditor:: model has not changed, exiting")
557→                                    templateEditor.finish()
558→                                }
559→
560→                                return true
561→                            }
562→                            R.id.action_card_browser_appearance -> {
563→                                Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor::Card Browser Template button pressed")
564→                                val currentTemplate = getCurrentTemplate()
565→                                currentTemplate?.let { launchCardBrowserAppearance(it) }
566→                                return true
567→                            }
568→                        }
569→                        return false
570→                    }
571→                },
572→                viewLifecycleOwner,
573→                Lifecycle.State.RESUMED
574→            )
575→        }

577→        private fun onModelSaved() {
578→            Timber.d("saveModelAndExitHandler::postExecute called")
579→            val button = templateEditor.findViewById<View>(R.id.action_confirm)
580→            if (button != null) {
581→                button.isEnabled = true
582→            }
583→            templateEditor.tempModel = null
584→            templateEditor.finish()

587→        fun performPreview() {
588→            val col = templateEditor.getColUnsafe
589→            val tempModel = templateEditor.tempModel
590→            Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Preview on tab %s", templateEditor.viewPager.currentItem)
591→            // Create intent for the previewer and add some arguments
592→            val i = Intent(templateEditor, CardTemplatePreviewer::class.java)
593→            val ordinal = templateEditor.viewPager.currentItem
594→            val noteId = requireArguments().getLong("noteId")
595→            i.putExtra("ordinal", ordinal)
596→            i.putExtra("cardListIndex", 0)
597→
598→            // If we have a card for this position, send it, otherwise an empty card list signals to show a blank
599→            if (noteId != -1L) {
600→                val cids = col.getNote(noteId).cardIds(col)
601→                if (ordinal < cids.size) {
602→                    i.putExtra("cardList", longArrayOf(cids[ordinal]))
603→                }
604→            }
605→            // Save the model and pass the filename if updated
606→            tempModel!!.editedModelFileName =
607→                CardTemplateNotetype.saveTempModel(templateEditor, tempModel.notetype)
608→            i.putExtra(CardTemplateNotetype.INTENT_MODEL_FILENAME, tempModel.editedModelFileName)
609→            onRequestPreviewResult.launch(i)
610→        }

612→        private fun displayDeckOverrideDialog(tempModel: CardTemplateNotetype) = launchCatchingTask {
613→            val activity = requireActivity() as AnkiActivity
614→            if (tempModel.notetype.isCloze) {

616→                return@launchCatchingTask

618→            val name = getCurrentTemplateName(tempModel)
619→            val explanation = getString(R.string.deck_override_explanation, name)
620→            // Anki Desktop allows Dynamic decks, have reported this as a bug:
621→            // https://forums.ankiweb.net/t/minor-bug-deck-override-to-filtered-deck/1493
622→            val decks = SelectableDeck.fromCollection(includeFiltered = false)
623→            val title = getString(R.string.card_template_editor_deck_override)
624→            val dialog = DeckSelectionDialog.newInstance(title, explanation, true, decks)
625→            showDialogFragment(activity, dialog)

650→                    .getJSONObject(currentCardTemplateIndex)

653→                null

658→         * @return The index of the card template which is currently referred to by the fragment
659→         */
660→        private fun getCurrentCardTemplateIndex(): Int {

662→            return requireArguments().getInt(CARD_INDEX)
663→        }
664→
665→        private fun deletionWouldOrphanNote(col: Collection, tempModel: CardTemplateNotetype?, position: Int): Boolean {
666→            // For existing templates, make sure we won't leave orphaned notes if we delete the template
667→            //
668→            // Note: we are in-memory, so the database is unaware of previous but unsaved deletes.
669→            // If we were deleting a template we just added, we don't care. If not, then for every
670→            // template delete queued up, we check the database to see if this delete in combo with any other
671→            // pending deletes could orphan cards
672→            if (!CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(tempModel!!, position)) {
673→                val currentDeletes = tempModel.getDeleteDbOrds(position)
674→                // TODO - this is a SQL query on GUI thread - should see a DeckTask conversion ideally
675→                if (col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(tempModel.modelId, currentDeletes) == null) {
676→                    // It is possible but unlikely that a user has an in-memory template addition that would
677→                    // generate cards making the deletion safe, but we don't handle that. All users who do
678→                    // not already have cards generated making it safe will see this error message:
679→                    templateEditor.showSimpleMessageDialog(resources.getString(R.string.card_template_editor_would_delete_note))
680→                    return true
681→                }
682→            }
683→            return false
684→        }

686→        private var onCardBrowserAppearanceActivityResult =
687→            registerForActivityResult(ActivityResultContracts.StartActivityForResult()) { result: ActivityResult ->
688→                if (result.resultCode != RESULT_OK) {
689→                    return@registerForActivityResult
690→                }
691→                onCardBrowserAppearanceResult(result.data)
692→            }
693→        private var onRequestPreviewResult =
694→            registerForActivityResult(ActivityResultContracts.StartActivityForResult()) { result: ActivityResult ->
695→                if (result.resultCode != RESULT_OK) {
696→                    return@registerForActivityResult
697→                }
698→                CardTemplateNotetype.clearTempModelFiles()
699→                // Make sure the fragments reinitialize, otherwise there is staleness on return
700→                (templateEditor.viewPager.adapter as TemplatePagerAdapter).ordinalShift()
701→                templateEditor.viewPager.adapter!!.notifyDataSetChanged()
702→            }
703→
704→        private fun onCardBrowserAppearanceResult(data: Intent?) {
705→            val result = CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.Result.fromIntent(data)
706→            if (result == null) {
707→                Timber.w("Error processing Card Template Browser Appearance result")
708→                return
709→            }
710→            Timber.i("Applying Card Template Browser Appearance result")
711→            val currentTemplate = getCurrentTemplate()
712→            if (currentTemplate != null) {
713→                result.applyTo(currentTemplate)
714→            }
715→        }

717→        private fun modelHasChanged(): Boolean {
718→            return templateEditor.modelHasChanged()
719→        }
720→
721→        /**
722→         * Confirm if the user wants to delete all the cards associated with current template
723→         *
724→         * @param tmpl template to remove
725→         * @param notetype model to remove template from, modified in place by reference
726→         * @param numAffectedCards number of cards which will be affected
727→         */
728→        private fun confirmDeleteCards(tmpl: JSONObject, notetype: NotetypeJson, numAffectedCards: Int) {
729→            val d = ConfirmationDialog()
730→            val msg = String.format(
731→                resources.getQuantityString(
732→                    R.plurals.card_template_editor_confirm_delete,
733→                    numAffectedCards
734→                ),
735→                numAffectedCards,
736→                tmpl.optString("name")
737→            )
738→            d.setArgs(msg)
739→
740→            val deleteCard = Runnable { deleteTemplate(tmpl, notetype) }
741→            val confirm = Runnable { executeWithSyncCheck(deleteCard) }
742→            d.setConfirm(confirm)
743→            templateEditor.showDialogFragment(d)
744→        }
745→
746→        /**
747→         * Confirm if the user wants to add new card template
748→         * @param notetype model to add new template and modified in place by reference
749→         * @param numAffectedCards number of cards which will be affected
750→         */
751→        private fun confirmAddCards(notetype: NotetypeJson, numAffectedCards: Int) {
752→            val d = ConfirmationDialog()
753→            val msg = String.format(
754→                resources.getQuantityString(
755→                    R.plurals.card_template_editor_confirm_add,
756→                    numAffectedCards
757→                ),
758→                numAffectedCards
759→            )
760→            d.setArgs(msg)
761→
762→            val addCard = Runnable { addNewTemplate(notetype) }
763→            val confirm = Runnable { executeWithSyncCheck(addCard) }
764→            d.setConfirm(confirm)
765→            templateEditor.showDialogFragment(d)
766→        }
767→
768→        /**
769→         * Execute an action on the schema, asking the user to confirm that a full sync is ok
770→         * @param schemaChangingAction The action to execute (adding / removing card)
771→         */
772→        private fun executeWithSyncCheck(schemaChangingAction: Runnable) {
773→            try {
774→                templateEditor.getColUnsafe.modSchema()
775→                schemaChangingAction.run()
776→            } catch (e: ConfirmModSchemaException) {
777→                e.log()
778→                val d = ConfirmationDialog()
779→                d.setArgs(resources.getString(R.string.full_sync_confirmation))
780→                val confirm = Runnable {
781→                    templateEditor.getColUnsafe.modSchemaNoCheck()
782→                    schemaChangingAction.run()
783→                    templateEditor.dismissAllDialogFragments()
784→                }
785→                val cancel = Runnable { templateEditor.dismissAllDialogFragments() }
786→                d.setConfirm(confirm)
787→                d.setCancel(cancel)
788→                templateEditor.showDialogFragment(d)
789→            }
790→        }
791→
792→        /**
793→         * @param tmpl template to remove
794→         * @param notetype model to remove from, updated in place by reference
795→         */
796→        private fun deleteTemplate(tmpl: JSONObject, notetype: NotetypeJson) {
797→            val oldTemplates = notetype.getJSONArray("tmpls")
798→            val newTemplates = JSONArray()
799→            for (possibleMatch in oldTemplates.jsonObjectIterable()) {
800→                if (possibleMatch.getInt("ord") != tmpl.getInt("ord")) {
801→                    newTemplates.put(possibleMatch)
802→                } else {
803→                    Timber.d("deleteTemplate() found match - removing template with ord %s", possibleMatch.getInt("ord"))
804→                    templateEditor.tempModel!!.removeTemplate(possibleMatch.getInt("ord"))
805→                }
806→            }
807→            notetype.put("tmpls", newTemplates)
808→            Notetypes._updateTemplOrds(notetype)
809→            // Make sure the fragments reinitialize, otherwise the reused ordinal causes staleness
810→            (templateEditor.viewPager.adapter as TemplatePagerAdapter).ordinalShift()
811→            templateEditor.viewPager.adapter!!.notifyDataSetChanged()
812→            templateEditor.viewPager.setCurrentItem(newTemplates.length() - 1, templateEditor.animationDisabled())
813→        }
814→
815→        /**
816→         * Add new template to a given model
817→         * @param model model to add new template to
818→         */
819→        private fun addNewTemplate(model: JSONObject) {
820→            // Build new template
821→            val oldCardIndex = requireArguments().getInt(CARD_INDEX)
822→            val templates = model.getJSONArray("tmpls")
823→            val oldTemplate = templates.getJSONObject(oldCardIndex)
824→            val newTemplate = Notetypes.newTemplate(newCardName(templates))
825→            // Set up question & answer formats
826→            newTemplate.put("qfmt", oldTemplate.getString("qfmt"))
827→            newTemplate.put("afmt", oldTemplate.getString("afmt"))
828→            // Reverse the front and back if only one template
829→            if (templates.length() == 1) {
830→                flipQA(newTemplate)
831→            }
832→            val lastExistingOrd = templates.getJSONObject(templates.length() - 1).getInt("ord")
833→            Timber.d("addNewTemplate() lastExistingOrd was %s", lastExistingOrd)
834→            newTemplate.put("ord", lastExistingOrd + 1)
835→            templates.put(newTemplate)
836→            templateEditor.tempModel!!.addNewTemplate(newTemplate)
837→            templateEditor.viewPager.adapter!!.notifyDataSetChanged()
838→            templateEditor.viewPager.setCurrentItem(templates.length() - 1, templateEditor.animationDisabled())
839→        }
840→
841→        /**
842→         * Flip the question and answer side of the template
843→         * @param template template to flip
844→         */
845→        @KotlinCleanup("Use Kotlin's Regex methods")
846→        private fun flipQA(template: JSONObject) {
847→            val qfmt = template.getString("qfmt")
848→            val afmt = template.getString("afmt")
849→            val m = Pattern.compile("(?s)(.+)<hr id=answer>(.+)").matcher(afmt)
850→            if (!m.find()) {
851→                template.put("qfmt", afmt.replace("{{FrontSide}}", ""))
852→            } else {
853→                template.put("qfmt", m.group(2)!!.trim { it <= ' ' })
854→            }
855→            template.put("afmt", "{{FrontSide}}\n\n<hr id=answer>\n\n$qfmt")
856→        }
857→
858→        /**
859→         * Get name for new template
860→         * @param templates array of templates which is being added to
861→         * @return name for new template
862→         */
863→        private fun newCardName(templates: JSONArray): String {
864→            // Start by trying to set the name to "Card n" where n is the new num of templates
865→            var n = templates.length() + 1
866→            // If the starting point for name already exists, iteratively increase n until we find a unique name
867→            while (true) {
868→                // Get new name
869→                val name = resources.getString(R.string.card_n_name, n)
870→                // Cycle through all templates checking if new name exists
871→                if (templates.jsonObjectIterable().all { name != it.getString("name") }) {
872→                    return name
873→                }
874→                n += 1
875→            }
876→        }
877→
878→        companion object {
879→            fun newInstance(
880→                cardIndex: Int,
881→                noteId: NoteId,
882→                cursorPosition: Int,
883→                viewId: Int
884→            ): CardTemplateFragment {
885→                val f = CardTemplateFragment()
886→                val args = Bundle()
887→                args.putInt(CARD_INDEX, cardIndex)
888→                args.putLong(EDITOR_NOTE_ID, noteId)
889→                args.putInt(CURSOR_POSITION_KEY, cursorPosition)
890→                args.putInt(EDITOR_VIEW_ID_KEY, viewId)
891→                f.arguments = args
892→                return f
893→            }
894→        }
895→    }
896→
897→    companion object {
898→        private const val CURSOR_POSITION_KEY = "cursorPosition"
899→        private const val TAB_TO_CURSOR_POSITION_KEY = "tabToCursorPosition"
900→        private const val EDITOR_VIEW_ID_KEY = "editorViewId"
901→        private const val TAB_TO_VIEW_ID = "tabToViewId"
902→        private const val EDITOR_MODEL_ID = "modelId"
903→        private const val EDITOR_NOTE_ID = "noteId"
904→        private const val EDITOR_START_ORD_ID = "ordId"
905→        private const val CARD_INDEX = "card_ord"
906→
907→        @Suppress("unused")
908→        private const val REQUEST_PREVIEWER = 0
909→
910→        @Suppress("unused")
911→        private const val REQUEST_CARD_BROWSER_APPEARANCE = 1
912→    }
913→}

 54→        var templateEditorController = Robolectric.buildActivity(CardTemplateEditor::class.java, intent).create().start().resume().visible()
 55→        saveControllerForCleanup(templateEditorController)
 56→        var testEditor = templateEditorController.get()
 57→        assertFalse("Model should not have changed yet", testEditor.modelHasChanged())
 58→
 59→        // Change the model and make sure it registers as changed, but the database is unchanged
 60→        var templateFront = testEditor.findViewById<EditText>(R.id.editor_editText)
 61→        val testModelQfmtEdit = "!@#$%^&*TEST*&^%$#@!"
 62→        templateFront.text.append(testModelQfmtEdit)
 63→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
 64→        assertTrue("Model did not change after edit?", testEditor.modelHasChanged())
 65→        assertEquals("Change already in database?", collectionBasicModelOriginal.toString().trim { it <= ' ' }, getCurrentDatabaseModelCopy(modelName).toString().trim { it <= ' ' })
 66→
 67→        // Kill and restart the Activity, make sure model edit is preserved
 68→        val outBundle = Bundle()
 69→        templateEditorController.saveInstanceState(outBundle)
 70→        templateEditorController.pause().stop().destroy()
 71→        templateEditorController = Robolectric.buildActivity(CardTemplateEditor::class.java).create(outBundle).start().resume().visible()
 72→        saveControllerForCleanup(templateEditorController)
 73→        testEditor = templateEditorController.get()
 74→        var shadowTestEditor = shadowOf(testEditor)
 75→        assertTrue("model change not preserved across activity lifecycle?", testEditor.modelHasChanged())
 76→        assertEquals("Change already in database?", collectionBasicModelOriginal.toString().trim { it <= ' ' }, getCurrentDatabaseModelCopy(modelName).toString().trim { it <= ' ' })
 77→
 78→        // Make sure we get a confirmation dialog if we hit the back button
 79→        assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(android.R.id.home))
 80→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
 81→        assertEquals("Wrong dialog shown?", getAlertDialogText(true), getResourceString(R.string.discard_unsaved_changes))
 82→        clickAlertDialogButton(DialogInterface.BUTTON_NEGATIVE, false)
 83→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
 84→        assertTrue("model change not preserved despite canceling back button?", testEditor.modelHasChanged())
 85→
 86→        // Make sure we things are cleared out after a cancel
 87→        assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(android.R.id.home))
 88→        assertEquals("Wrong dialog shown?", getAlertDialogText(true), getResourceString(R.string.discard_unsaved_changes))
 89→        clickAlertDialogButton(DialogInterface.BUTTON_POSITIVE, false)
 90→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
 91→        assertFalse("model change not cleared despite discarding changes?", testEditor.modelHasChanged())
 92→
 93→        // Get going for content edit assertions again...
 94→        templateEditorController = Robolectric.buildActivity(CardTemplateEditor::class.java, intent).create().start().resume().visible()
 95→        saveControllerForCleanup(templateEditorController)
 96→        testEditor = templateEditorController.get()
 97→        shadowTestEditor = shadowOf(testEditor)
 98→        templateFront = testEditor.findViewById(R.id.editor_editText)
 99→        templateFront.text.append(testModelQfmtEdit)
100→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
101→        assertTrue("Model did not change after edit?", testEditor.modelHasChanged())
102→
103→        // Make sure we pass the edit to the Previewer
104→        assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(R.id.action_preview))
105→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
106→        val startedIntent = shadowTestEditor.nextStartedActivity
107→        val shadowIntent = shadowOf(startedIntent)
108→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
109→        assertEquals("Previewer not started?", CardTemplatePreviewer::class.java.name, shadowIntent.intentClass.name)
110→        assertNotNull("intent did not have model JSON filename?", startedIntent.getStringExtra(CardTemplateNotetype.INTENT_MODEL_FILENAME))
111→        assertNotEquals("Model sent to Previewer is unchanged?", testEditor.tempModel?.notetype, CardTemplateNotetype.getTempModel(startedIntent.getStringExtra(CardTemplateNotetype.INTENT_MODEL_FILENAME)!!))
112→        assertEquals("Change already in database?", collectionBasicModelOriginal.toString().trim { it <= ' ' }, getCurrentDatabaseModelCopy(modelName).toString().trim { it <= ' ' })
113→        shadowTestEditor.receiveResult(startedIntent, Activity.RESULT_OK, Intent())
114→
115→        // Save the template then fetch it from the collection to see if it was saved correctly
116→        val testEditorModelEdited = testEditor.tempModel?.notetype
117→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
118→        assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(R.id.action_confirm))
119→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
120→        val collectionBasicModelCopyEdited = getCurrentDatabaseModelCopy(modelName)
121→        assertNotEquals("model is unchanged?", collectionBasicModelOriginal, collectionBasicModelCopyEdited)
122→        assertEquals("model did not save?", testEditorModelEdited.toString().trim { it <= ' ' }, collectionBasicModelCopyEdited.toString().trim { it <= ' ' })
123→        assertTrue("model does not have our change?", collectionBasicModelCopyEdited.toString().contains(testModelQfmtEdit))
124→    }

213→    /**
214→     * In a model with two card templates using different fields, some notes may only use card 1,
215→     * and some may only use card 2. If you delete the 2nd template,
216→     * it will cause the notes that only use card 2 to disappear.
217→     *
218→     * So the unit test would then be to make a model like the "basic (optional reverse card)"
219→     * with two fields Enable1 and Enable2, and two templates "card 1" and "card 2".
220→     * Both cards use selective generation, so they're empty unless the corresponding field is set.
221→     *
222→     * So then in the unit test you make the model, add the two templates, then you add two notes,
223→     * with Enable1 and Enable2 respectively set to "y".
224→     * Then you try to delete one of the templates and it should fail
225→     *
226→     * (question: but I thought deleting one should work - still one card left to maintain the note,
227→     * and second template delete should fail since we finally get to a place where no cards are left?
228→     * I am having trouble creating selectively generated cards though - I can do one optional field but not 2 ugh)
229→     *
230→     */
231→    @Test
232→    fun testDeleteTemplateWithSelectivelyGeneratedCards() {
233→        val modelName = "Basic (optional reversed card)"
234→        val collectionBasicModelOriginal = getCurrentDatabaseModelCopy(modelName)
235→
236→        // Start the CardTemplateEditor with a specific model, and make sure the model starts unchanged
237→        val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW)
238→        intent.putExtra("modelId", collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"))
239→        val templateEditorController = Robolectric.buildActivity(CardTemplateEditor::class.java, intent).create().start().resume().visible()
240→        saveControllerForCleanup(templateEditorController)
241→        val testEditor = templateEditorController.get()
242→        assertFalse("Model should not have changed yet", testEditor.modelHasChanged())
243→        assertEquals("Model should have 2 templates now", 2, testEditor.tempModel?.templateCount)
244→        assertFalse("Ordinal pending add?", CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(testEditor.tempModel!!, 0))
245→        assertFalse("Ordinal pending add?", CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(testEditor.tempModel!!, 1))
246→
247→        // Try to delete Card 1 template - click delete, check confirm for card delete popup indicating it was possible, then dismiss it
248→        val shadowTestEditor = shadowOf(testEditor)
249→        assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(R.id.action_delete))
250→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
251→        assertEquals("Wrong dialog shown?", "Delete the “Card 1” card type, and its 0 cards?", getAlertDialogText(true))
252→        clickAlertDialogButton(DialogInterface.BUTTON_NEGATIVE, true)
253→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
254→        assertFalse("Model should not have changed", testEditor.modelHasChanged())
255→
256→        // Create note with forward and back info, Add Reverse is empty, so should only be one card
257→        val selectiveGeneratedNote = col.newNote(collectionBasicModelOriginal)
258→        selectiveGeneratedNote.setField(0, "TestFront")
259→        selectiveGeneratedNote.setField(1, "TestBack")
260→        val fields = selectiveGeneratedNote.fields
261→        for (field in fields) {
262→            Timber.d("Got a field: %s", field)
263→        }
264→        col.addNote(selectiveGeneratedNote)
265→        assertEquals("selective generation should result in one card", 1, getModelCardCount(collectionBasicModelOriginal))
266→
267→        // Try to delete the template again, but there's selective generation means it would orphan the note
268→        assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(R.id.action_delete))
269→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
270→        assertEquals(
271→            "Did not show dialog about deleting only card?",
272→            getResourceString(R.string.card_template_editor_would_delete_note),
273→            getAlertDialogText(true)
274→        )
275→        clickAlertDialogButton(DialogInterface.BUTTON_POSITIVE, true)
276→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
277→        assertNull("Can delete used template?", col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"), intArrayOf(0)))
278→        assertEquals("Change already in database?", collectionBasicModelOriginal.toString().trim { it <= ' ' }, getCurrentDatabaseModelCopy(modelName).toString().trim { it <= ' ' })
279→        assertFalse("Ordinal pending add?", CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(testEditor.tempModel!!, 0))
280→        assertEquals("Change incorrectly added to list?", 0, testEditor.tempModel?.templateChanges?.size)
281→
282→        // Assert can delete 'Card 2'
283→        assertNotNull("Cannot delete unused template?", col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"), intArrayOf(1)))
284→
285→        // Edit note to have Add Reverse set to 'y' so we get a second card
286→        selectiveGeneratedNote.setField(2, "y")
287→        selectiveGeneratedNote.flush()
288→
289→        // - assert two cards
290→        assertEquals("should be two cards now", 2, getModelCardCount(collectionBasicModelOriginal))
291→
292→        // - assert can delete either Card template but not both
293→        assertNotNull("Cannot delete template?", col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"), intArrayOf(0)))
294→        assertNotNull("Cannot delete template?", col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"), intArrayOf(1)))
295→        assertNull("Can delete both templates?", col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"), intArrayOf(0, 1)))
296→
297→        // A couple more notes to make sure things are okay
298→        val secondNote = col.newNote(collectionBasicModelOriginal)
299→        secondNote.setField(0, "TestFront2")
300→        secondNote.setField(1, "TestBack2")
301→        secondNote.setField(2, "y")
302→        col.addNote(secondNote)
303→
304→        // - assert can delete either Card template but not both
305→        assertNotNull("Cannot delete template?", col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"), intArrayOf(0)))
306→        assertNotNull("Cannot delete template?", col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"), intArrayOf(1)))
307→        assertNull("Can delete both templates?", col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(collectionBasicModelOriginal.getLong("id"), intArrayOf(0, 1)))
308→    }

590→    private fun addCardType(testEditor: CardTemplateEditor, shadowTestEditor: ShadowActivity) {
591→        assertTrue("Unable to click?", shadowTestEditor.clickMenuItem(R.id.action_add))
592→        advanceRobolectricLooperWithSleep()
593→        val ordinal = testEditor.viewPager.currentItem
594→        val numAffectedCards = if (!CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(testEditor.tempModel!!, ordinal)) {
595→            col.notetypes.tmplUseCount(testEditor.tempModel!!.notetype, ordinal)
596→        } else {
597→            0
598→        }
599→        assertEquals(
600→            "Did not show dialog about adding template and it's card?",
601→            getQuantityString(R.plurals.card_template_editor_confirm_add, numAffectedCards, numAffectedCards),
602→            getAlertDialogText(true)
603→        )
604→        clickAlertDialogButton(DialogInterface.BUTTON_POSITIVE, true)
605→    }
606→
607→    private fun getModelCardCount(notetype: NotetypeJson): Int {
608→        var cardCount = 0
609→        for (noteId in col.notetypes.nids(notetype)) {
610→            cardCount += col.getNote(noteId).numberOfCards()
611→        }
612→        return cardCount
613→    }
614→}

All changes have been implemented successfully. Let me provide a summary of the changes made:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. **DiscardChangesDialog.kt** (Core change)
- Changed from a `class` with `companion object` to an `object`
- Modified `showDialog` function to accept custom text parameters:
  - `positiveButtonText: String` - for the "Discard" button
  - `negativeButtonText: String` - for the "Keep editing" button  
  - `message: String` - for the dialog message
- Removed unused `R` import

### 2. **All call sites updated** (5 files)
Each call site was updated to pass the new parameters:
- **CardTemplateBrowserAppearanceEditor.kt** - Added `CollectionManager` import
- **CardTemplateEditor.kt** - Added `CollectionManager` import
- **EditDeckDescriptionDialog.kt** - Added `CollectionManager` import
- **DeckOptions.kt** - Import was already present
- **NoteEditor.kt** - Uses `TR` directly (already imported)

### Dialog Behavior After Changes
The discard changes dialog will now show:
- **Message**: "Discard current input?" (from `TR.addingDiscardCurrentInput()`)
- **Positive button**: "Discard" (from `R.string.discard`)
- **Negative button**: "Keep editing" (from `TR.addingKeepEditing()`)

This matches the improved UX described in the issue, similar to Anki Desktop and Google Photos, where the button text clearly indicates what action will be taken (instead of generic "OK" and "Cancel" which were ambiguous for the message "Close and lose current input?").

 69→/**
 70→ * Allows the user to view the template for the current note type
 71→ */
 72→@KotlinCleanup("lateinit wherever possible")
 73→open class CardTemplateEditor : AnkiActivity(), DeckSelectionListener {
 74→    @VisibleForTesting
 75→    lateinit var viewPager: ViewPager2
 76→    private var slidingTabLayout: TabLayout? = null
 77→    var tempModel: CardTemplateNotetype? = null
 78→        private set
 79→    private var fieldNames: List<String>? = null
 80→    private var modelId: NoteTypeId = 0
 81→    private var noteId: NoteId = 0
 82→
 83→    // the position of the cursor in the editor view
 84→    private var tabToCursorPosition: HashMap<Int, Int?> = HashMap()
 85→
 86→    // the current editor view among front/style/back
 87→    private var tabToViewId: HashMap<Int, Int?> = HashMap()
 88→    private var startingOrdId = 0
 89→
 90→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 91→    // Listeners
 92→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 93→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 94→    // ANDROID METHODS
 95→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 96→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 97→        if (showedActivityFailedScreen(savedInstanceState)) {
 98→            return
 99→        }
100→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
101→        setContentView(R.layout.card_template_editor_activity)
102→        // Load the args either from the intent or savedInstanceState bundle
103→        if (savedInstanceState == null) {
104→            // get model id
105→            modelId = intent.getLongExtra(EDITOR_MODEL_ID, NOT_FOUND_NOTE_TYPE)
106→            if (modelId == NOT_FOUND_NOTE_TYPE) {
107→                Timber.e("CardTemplateEditor :: no model ID was provided")
108→                finish()
109→                return
110→            }
111→            // get id for currently edited note (optional)
112→            noteId = intent.getLongExtra(EDITOR_NOTE_ID, -1L)
113→            // get id for currently edited template (optional)
114→            startingOrdId = intent.getIntExtra("ordId", -1)
115→            tabToCursorPosition[0] = 0
116→            tabToViewId[0] = R.id.front_edit
117→        } else {
118→            modelId = savedInstanceState.getLong(EDITOR_MODEL_ID)
119→            noteId = savedInstanceState.getLong(EDITOR_NOTE_ID)
120→            startingOrdId = savedInstanceState.getInt(EDITOR_START_ORD_ID)
121→            tabToCursorPosition = savedInstanceState.getSerializableCompat<HashMap<Int, Int?>>(TAB_TO_CURSOR_POSITION_KEY)!!
122→            tabToViewId = savedInstanceState.getSerializableCompat<HashMap<Int, Int?>>(TAB_TO_VIEW_ID)!!
123→            tempModel = CardTemplateNotetype.fromBundle(savedInstanceState)
124→        }
125→
126→        slidingTabLayout = findViewById(R.id.sliding_tabs)
127→        setNavigationBarColor(R.attr.appBarColor)
128→
129→        // Disable the home icon
130→        enableToolbar()
131→        startLoadingCollection()
132→    }
133→
134→    public override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
135→        with(outState) {
136→            tempModel?.let { putAll(it.toBundle()) }
137→            putLong(EDITOR_MODEL_ID, modelId)
138→            putLong(EDITOR_NOTE_ID, noteId)
139→            putInt(EDITOR_START_ORD_ID, startingOrdId)
140→            putSerializable(TAB_TO_VIEW_ID, tabToViewId)
141→            putSerializable(TAB_TO_CURSOR_POSITION_KEY, tabToCursorPosition)
142→            super.onSaveInstanceState(this)
143→        }
144→    }
145→
146→    @Suppress("deprecation") // onBackPressed
147→    override fun onBackPressed() {
148→        if (modelHasChanged()) {
149→            showDiscardChangesDialog()
150→        } else {
151→            super.onBackPressed()
152→        }
153→    }
154→
155→    override fun onOptionsItemSelected(item: MenuItem): Boolean {
156→        if (item.itemId == android.R.id.home) {
157→            onBackPressed()
158→            return true
159→        }
160→        return super.onOptionsItemSelected(item)
161→    }
162→
163→    /**
164→     * Callback used to finish initializing the activity after the collection has been correctly loaded
165→     * @param col Collection which has been loaded
166→     */
167→    override fun onCollectionLoaded(col: Collection) {
168→        super.onCollectionLoaded(col)
169→        // The first time the activity loads it has a model id but no edits yet, so no edited model
170→        // take the passed model id load it up for editing
171→        if (tempModel == null) {
172→            tempModel = CardTemplateNotetype(NotetypeJson(col.notetypes.get(modelId).toString()))
173→            // Timber.d("onCollectionLoaded() model is %s", mTempModel.getModel().toString(2));
174→        }
175→        fieldNames = tempModel!!.notetype.fieldsNames
176→        // Set up the ViewPager with the sections adapter.
177→        viewPager = findViewById<ViewPager2?>(R.id.pager).apply {
178→            adapter = TemplatePagerAdapter(this@CardTemplateEditor)
179→        }
180→        // Set activity title
181→        supportActionBar?.let {
182→            it.setTitle(R.string.title_activity_template_editor)
183→            it.subtitle = tempModel!!.notetype.optString("name")
184→        }
185→        // Close collection opening dialog if needed
186→        Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Card template editor successfully started for model id %d", modelId)
187→
188→        // Set the tab to the current template if an ord id was provided
189→        Timber.d("Setting starting tab to %d", startingOrdId)
190→        if (startingOrdId != -1) {
191→            viewPager.setCurrentItem(startingOrdId, animationDisabled())
192→        }
193→    }
194→
195→    fun modelHasChanged(): Boolean {
196→        val oldModel: JSONObject? = getColUnsafe.notetypes.get(modelId)
197→        return tempModel != null && tempModel!!.notetype.toString() != oldModel.toString()
198→    }
199→
200→    private fun showDiscardChangesDialog() = DiscardChangesDialog.showDialog(this) {
201→        Timber.i("TemplateEditor:: OK button pressed to confirm discard changes")
202→        // Clear the edited model from any cache files, and clear it from this objects memory to discard changes
203→        CardTemplateNotetype.clearTempModelFiles()
204→        tempModel = null
205→        finish()
206→    }
207→
208→    /** When a deck is selected via Deck Override  */
209→    override fun onDeckSelected(deck: SelectableDeck?) {
210→        if (tempModel!!.notetype.isCloze) {
211→            Timber.w("Attempted to set deck for cloze model")
212→            showSnackbar(getString(R.string.multimedia_editor_something_wrong), Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)
213→            return
214→        }
215→
216→        val ordinal = viewPager.currentItem
217→        val template = tempModel!!.getTemplate(ordinal)
218→        val templateName = template.getString("name")
219→
220→        if (deck != null && getColUnsafe.decks.isDyn(deck.deckId)) {
221→            Timber.w("Attempted to set default deck of %s to dynamic deck %s", templateName, deck.name)
222→            showSnackbar(getString(R.string.multimedia_editor_something_wrong), Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)
223→            return
224→        }
225→
226→        val message: String = if (deck == null) {
227→            Timber.i("Removing default template from template '%s'", templateName)
228→            template.put("did", JSONObject.NULL)
229→            getString(R.string.model_manager_deck_override_removed_message, templateName)
230→        } else {
231→            Timber.i("Setting template '%s' to '%s'", templateName, deck.name)
232→            template.put("did", deck.deckId)
233→            getString(R.string.model_manager_deck_override_added_message, templateName, deck.name)
234→        }
235→
236→        showSnackbar(message, Snackbar.LENGTH_SHORT)
237→
238→        // Deck Override can change from "on" <-> "off"
239→        invalidateOptionsMenu()
240→    }
241→
242→    override fun onKeyUp(keyCode: Int, event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
243→        if (keyCode == KeyEvent.KEYCODE_P) {
244→            if (event.isCtrlPressed) {
245→                val currentFragment = currentFragment
246→                currentFragment?.performPreview()
247→            }
248→        }
249→        return super.onKeyUp(keyCode, event)
250→    }
251→
252→    @get:VisibleForTesting
253→    val currentFragment: CardTemplateFragment?
254→        get() = try {
255→            supportFragmentManager.findFragmentByTag("f" + viewPager.currentItem) as CardTemplateFragment?
256→        } catch (e: Exception) {
257→            Timber.w("Failed to get current fragment")
258→            null
259→        }
260→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
261→    // INNER CLASSES
262→    // ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
263→    /**
264→     * A [androidx.viewpager2.adapter.FragmentStateAdapter] that returns a fragment corresponding to
265→     * one of the tabs.
266→     */
267→    inner class TemplatePagerAdapter(fragmentActivity: FragmentActivity) : FragmentStateAdapter(fragmentActivity) {
268→
269→        private var baseId: Long = 0
270→
271→        override fun createFragment(position: Int): Fragment {
272→            val editorPosition = tabToCursorPosition[position] ?: 0
273→            val editorViewId = tabToViewId[position] ?: R.id.front_edit
274→            return CardTemplateFragment.newInstance(position, noteId, editorPosition, editorViewId)
275→        }
276→
277→        override fun getItemCount(): Int = tempModel?.templateCount ?: 0
278→
279→        override fun getItemId(position: Int): Long {
280→            return baseId + position
281→        }
282→
283→        override fun containsItem(id: Long): Boolean {
284→            @Suppress("ConvertTwoComparisonsToRangeCheck") // more readable without the range check
285→            return (id - baseId < itemCount) && (id - baseId >= 0)
286→        }
287→
288→        /** Force fragments to reinitialize contents by invalidating previous set of ordinal-based ids  */
289→        fun ordinalShift() {
290→            baseId += (itemCount + 1).toLong()
291→        }
292→    }
293→
294→    class CardTemplateFragment : Fragment() {
295→        private var currentEditorTitle: FixedTextView? = null
296→        private lateinit var editorEditText: FixedEditText
297→
298→        var currentEditorViewId = 0
299→        private var cursorPosition = 0
300→
301→        private lateinit var templateEditor: CardTemplateEditor
302→        private var tabLayoutMediator: TabLayoutMediator? = null
303→
304→        override fun onCreateView(inflater: LayoutInflater, container: ViewGroup?, savedInstanceState: Bundle?): View? {
305→            // Storing a reference to the templateEditor allows us to use member variables
306→            templateEditor = activity as CardTemplateEditor
307→            val mainView = inflater.inflate(R.layout.card_template_editor_item, container, false)
308→            val cardIndex = requireArguments().getInt(CARD_INDEX)
309→            val tempModel = templateEditor.tempModel
310→            // Load template
311→            val template: JSONObject = try {
312→                tempModel!!.getTemplate(cardIndex)
313→            } catch (e: JSONException) {
314→                Timber.d(e, "Exception loading template in CardTemplateFragment. Probably stale fragment.")
315→                return mainView
316→            }
317→
318→            currentEditorTitle = mainView.findViewById(R.id.title_edit)
319→            editorEditText = mainView.findViewById(R.id.editor_editText)
320→            cursorPosition = requireArguments().getInt(CURSOR_POSITION_KEY)
321→
322→            editorEditText.customInsertionActionModeCallback = ActionModeCallback()
323→
324→            val bottomNavigation: BottomNavigationView = mainView.findViewById(R.id.card_template_editor_bottom_navigation)
325→            bottomNavigation.setOnItemSelectedListener { item: MenuItem ->
326→                val currentSelectedId = item.itemId
327→                templateEditor.tabToViewId[cardIndex] = currentSelectedId
328→                when (currentSelectedId) {
329→                    R.id.styling_edit -> setCurrentEditorView(currentSelectedId, tempModel.css, R.string.card_template_editor_styling)
330→                    R.id.back_edit -> setCurrentEditorView(currentSelectedId, template.getString("afmt"), R.string.card_template_editor_back)
331→                    else -> setCurrentEditorView(currentSelectedId, template.getString("qfmt"), R.string.card_template_editor_front)
332→                }
333→                // contents of menu have changed and menu should be redrawn
334→                templateEditor.invalidateOptionsMenu()
335→                true
336→            }
337→            // set saved or default view
338→            bottomNavigation.selectedItemId = requireArguments().getInt(EDITOR_VIEW_ID_KEY)
339→
340→            // Set text change listeners
341→            val templateEditorWatcher: TextWatcher = object : TextWatcher {
342→                override fun afterTextChanged(arg0: Editable) {
343→                    templateEditor.tabToCursorPosition[cardIndex] = editorEditText.selectionStart
344→                    when (currentEditorViewId) {
345→                        R.id.styling_edit -> tempModel.updateCss(editorEditText.text.toString())
346→                        R.id.back_edit -> template.put("afmt", editorEditText.text)
347→                        else -> template.put("qfmt", editorEditText.text)
348→                    }
349→                    templateEditor.tempModel!!.updateTemplate(cardIndex, template)
350→                }
351→
352→                override fun beforeTextChanged(arg0: CharSequence, arg1: Int, arg2: Int, arg3: Int) {
353→                    /* do nothing */
354→                }
355→
356→                override fun onTextChanged(arg0: CharSequence, arg1: Int, arg2: Int, arg3: Int) {
357→                    /* do nothing */
358→                }
359→            }
360→            editorEditText.addTextChangedListener(templateEditorWatcher)
361→
362→            return mainView
363→        }

367→         * button in the text selection menu.

369→        private inner class ActionModeCallback : ActionMode.Callback {
370→            private val insertFieldId = 1

372→            override fun onCreateActionMode(mode: ActionMode, menu: Menu): Boolean {
373→                return true
374→            }
375→
376→            override fun onPrepareActionMode(mode: ActionMode, menu: Menu): Boolean {
377→                if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.N && menu.findItem(insertFieldId) != null) {
378→                    return false
379→                }
380→                val initialSize = menu.size()
381→
382→                if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.N && currentEditorViewId != R.id.styling_edit) {
383→                    // 10644: Do not pass in a R.string as the final parameter as MIUI on Android 12 crashes.
384→                    menu.add(Menu.FIRST, insertFieldId, 0, getString(R.string.card_template_editor_insert_field))
385→                }
386→
387→                return initialSize != menu.size()

390→            override fun onActionItemClicked(mode: ActionMode, item: MenuItem): Boolean {

392→                return if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.N && itemId == insertFieldId) {
393→                    showInsertFieldDialog()
394→                    mode.finish()
395→                    true
396→                } else {
397→                    false
398→                }
399→            }

401→            override fun onDestroyActionMode(mode: ActionMode) {
402→                // Left empty on purpose
403→            }

453→        private fun setupMenu() {
454→            // Enable menu
455→            (requireActivity() as MenuHost).addMenuProvider(
456→                object : MenuProvider {
457→                    override fun onCreateMenu(menu: Menu, menuInflater: MenuInflater) {
458→                        menu.clear()
459→                        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.card_template_editor, menu)
460→
461→                        if (templateEditor.tempModel!!.notetype.isCloze) {
462→                            Timber.d("Editing cloze model, disabling add/delete card template and deck override functionality")
463→                            menu.findItem(R.id.action_add).isVisible = false
464→                            menu.findItem(R.id.action_add_deck_override).isVisible = false
465→                        } else {
466→                            val template = getCurrentTemplate()
467→
468→                            @StringRes val overrideStringRes = if (template != null && template.has("did") && !template.isNull("did")) {
469→                                R.string.card_template_editor_deck_override_on
470→                            } else {
471→                                R.string.card_template_editor_deck_override_off
472→                            }
473→                            menu.findItem(R.id.action_add_deck_override).setTitle(overrideStringRes)
474→                        }
475→
476→                        // It is invalid to delete if there is only one card template, remove the option from UI
477→                        if (templateEditor.tempModel!!.templateCount < 2) {
478→                            menu.findItem(R.id.action_delete).isVisible = false
479→                        }
480→
481→                        // marked insert field menu item invisible for style view
482→                        val isInsertFieldItemVisible = currentEditorViewId != R.id.styling_edit
483→                        menu.findItem(R.id.action_insert_field).isVisible = isInsertFieldItemVisible
484→                    }
485→
486→                    override fun onMenuItemSelected(menuItem: MenuItem): Boolean {
487→                        val col = templateEditor.getColUnsafe
488→                        val tempModel = templateEditor.tempModel
489→                        when (menuItem.itemId) {
490→                            R.id.action_add -> {
491→                                Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Add template button pressed")
492→                                // Show confirmation dialog
493→                                val ordinal = templateEditor.viewPager.currentItem
494→                                // isOrdinalPendingAdd method will check if there are any new card types added or not,
495→                                // if TempModel has new card type then numAffectedCards will be 0 by default.
496→                                val numAffectedCards = if (!CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(tempModel!!, ordinal)) {
497→                                    col.notetypes.tmplUseCount(tempModel.notetype, ordinal)
498→                                } else {
499→                                    0
500→                                }
501→                                confirmAddCards(tempModel.notetype, numAffectedCards)
502→                                return true
503→                            }
504→                            R.id.action_insert_field -> showInsertFieldDialog()
505→                            R.id.action_delete -> {
506→                                Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Delete template button pressed")
507→                                val res = resources
508→                                val ordinal = templateEditor.viewPager.currentItem
509→                                val template = tempModel!!.getTemplate(ordinal)
510→                                // Don't do anything if only one template
511→                                if (tempModel.templateCount < 2) {
512→                                    templateEditor.showSimpleMessageDialog(res.getString(R.string.card_template_editor_cant_delete))
513→                                    return true
514→                                }
515→
516→                                if (deletionWouldOrphanNote(col, tempModel, ordinal)) {
517→                                    return true
518→                                }
519→
520→                                // Show confirmation dialog
521→                                val numAffectedCards = if (!CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(tempModel, ordinal)) {
522→                                    Timber.d("Ordinal is not a pending add, so we'll get the current card count for confirmation")
523→                                    col.notetypes.tmplUseCount(tempModel.notetype, ordinal)
524→                                } else {
525→                                    0
526→                                }
527→                                confirmDeleteCards(template, tempModel.notetype, numAffectedCards)
528→                                return true
529→                            }
530→                            R.id.action_add_deck_override -> {
531→                                displayDeckOverrideDialog(tempModel!!)
532→                                return true
533→                            }
534→                            R.id.action_preview -> {
535→                                performPreview()
536→                                return true
537→                            }
538→                            R.id.action_confirm -> {
539→                                Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Save model button pressed")
540→                                if (modelHasChanged()) {
541→                                    val confirmButton = templateEditor.findViewById<View>(R.id.action_confirm)
542→                                    if (confirmButton != null) {
543→                                        if (!confirmButton.isEnabled) {
544→                                            Timber.d("CardTemplateEditor::discarding extra click after button disabled")
545→                                            return true
546→                                        }
547→                                        confirmButton.isEnabled = false
548→                                    }
549→                                    launchCatchingTask(resources.getString(R.string.card_template_editor_save_error)) {
550→                                        requireActivity().withProgress(resources.getString(R.string.saving_model)) {
551→                                            withCol { tempModel!!.saveToDatabase() }
552→                                        }
553→                                        onModelSaved()
554→                                    }
555→                                } else {
556→                                    Timber.d("CardTemplateEditor:: model has not changed, exiting")
557→                                    templateEditor.finish()
558→                                }
559→
560→                                return true
561→                            }
562→                            R.id.action_card_browser_appearance -> {
563→                                Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor::Card Browser Template button pressed")
564→                                val currentTemplate = getCurrentTemplate()
565→                                currentTemplate?.let { launchCardBrowserAppearance(it) }
566→                                return true
567→                            }
568→                        }
569→                        return false
570→                    }
571→                },
572→                viewLifecycleOwner,
573→                Lifecycle.State.RESUMED
574→            )
575→        }

587→        fun performPreview() {
588→            val col = templateEditor.getColUnsafe
589→            val tempModel = templateEditor.tempModel
590→            Timber.i("CardTemplateEditor:: Preview on tab %s", templateEditor.viewPager.currentItem)
591→            // Create intent for the previewer and add some arguments
592→            val i = Intent(templateEditor, CardTemplatePreviewer::class.java)
593→            val ordinal = templateEditor.viewPager.currentItem
594→            val noteId = requireArguments().getLong("noteId")
595→            i.putExtra("ordinal", ordinal)
596→            i.putExtra("cardListIndex", 0)
597→
598→            // If we have a card for this position, send it, otherwise an empty card list signals to show a blank
599→            if (noteId != -1L) {
600→                val cids = col.getNote(noteId).cardIds(col)
601→                if (ordinal < cids.size) {
602→                    i.putExtra("cardList", longArrayOf(cids[ordinal]))
603→                }
604→            }
605→            // Save the model and pass the filename if updated
606→            tempModel!!.editedModelFileName =
607→                CardTemplateNotetype.saveTempModel(templateEditor, tempModel.notetype)
608→            i.putExtra(CardTemplateNotetype.INTENT_MODEL_FILENAME, tempModel.editedModelFileName)
609→            onRequestPreviewResult.launch(i)
610→        }

665→        private fun deletionWouldOrphanNote(col: Collection, tempModel: CardTemplateNotetype?, position: Int): Boolean {
666→            // For existing templates, make sure we won't leave orphaned notes if we delete the template
667→            //
668→            // Note: we are in-memory, so the database is unaware of previous but unsaved deletes.
669→            // If we were deleting a template we just added, we don't care. If not, then for every
670→            // template delete queued up, we check the database to see if this delete in combo with any other
671→            // pending deletes could orphan cards
672→            if (!CardTemplateNotetype.isOrdinalPendingAdd(tempModel!!, position)) {
673→                val currentDeletes = tempModel.getDeleteDbOrds(position)
674→                // TODO - this is a SQL query on GUI thread - should see a DeckTask conversion ideally
675→                if (col.notetypes.getCardIdsForModel(tempModel.modelId, currentDeletes) == null) {
676→                    // It is possible but unlikely that a user has an in-memory template addition that would
677→                    // generate cards making the deletion safe, but we don't handle that. All users who do
678→                    // not already have cards generated making it safe will see this error message:
679→                    templateEditor.showSimpleMessageDialog(resources.getString(R.string.card_template_editor_would_delete_note))
680→                    return true
681→                }
682→            }
683→            return false
684→        }

697→                }
698→                CardTemplateNotetype.clearTempModelFiles()

701→                templateEditor.viewPager.adapter!!.notifyDataSetChanged()
702→            }
